data.title: CZ'S DOG (BROCCOLI) is now listed on BitMart
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News BitMart announced that it has launched CZ'S DOG (BROCCOLI) for the first time at 12:00 (Eastern Time) on February 14, and this launch will open the BROCCOLI/USDT trading pair.

data.title: Bloomberg Launches Bitcoin-Gold Hybrid Index Series
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, on February 14, Bloomberg introduced the Bloomberg Bitcoin-Gold Hybrid Index Series, which includes the Bitcoin-Gold Equal Weight Index (BBIG) and the Dollar Bitcoin-Gold Equal Weight Index (BBUG). Bloomberg's data reveals that in 2024, the cryptocurrency market attracted over $220 billion in investments, spread across more than 250 ETF products.

The index is designed to combine the growth potential of Bitcoin with the stability characteristics of gold, using a unit-based framework that allows for future modifications and customization based on client needs. Jigna Gibb, Head of Commodity and Crypto Index Products at Bloomberg Index Services Limited, stated that this initiative marks the first of its kind among hybrid indices combining commodities and digital assets.

data.title: Michigan introduces cryptocurrency reserve bill to allow state government to invest in crypto assets
data.description: Michigan Representatives Bryan Posthumus and Ron Robinson filed HB 4087 on February 13, proposing to amend the state's Management and Budget Act to establish a strategic reserve of Bitcoin. The bill allows the state treasury to invest in cryptocurrencies from the general fund and the economic stabilization fund, with a cap of 10%, and to hold crypto assets through secure custody solutions or ETF products of registered investment companies. The bill also allows the state government to obtain additional income through cryptocurrency lending. Currently, 20 states across the United States have proposed similar bills. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Gate.io launches new user airdrop benefits, register and enjoy up to 100 IP airdrops
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Gate.io has launched Story (IP) contract trading, and will launch exclusive IP airdrop benefits for newcomers from 12:00 on February 14, 2025 to 23:59 on February 21, 2025 (UTC+8). Participate in registration and trading to enjoy up to 100 IP airdrops.

data.title: Early POPCAT holders transferred $3.15 million of POPCAT to Bybit 7 hours ago
data.description: Spot On Chain monitoring shows that an early POPCAT token holder transferred 10 million POPCAT (about $3.15 million) to Bybit about 7 hours ago after being silent for two months. The address first purchased 9.27 million POPCAT for 350 SOL (about $24,500) on December 14, 2023. The address currently still holds 1.173 million POPCAT (about $404,000), with a total profit of $7.32 million and a yield of 633%. In addition, the address also holds 8.62 million FARTCOIN (about $4.17 million), with a floating profit of $746,000, an increase of 22%.

data.title: AscendEX will launch the BROCCOLI series of tokens for the first time
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: AscendEX (formerly BitMax) will launch the BROCCOLI series of tokens at 13:00 on February 14, including: CZ'S DOG (BROCCOLI), Broccoli (BROCCOLI1), Broccoli (BROCCOLI2), Broccoli (BROCCOLI3), and will open BROCCOLI/USDT, BROCCOLI1/USDT, BROCCOLI2/USDT, BROCCOLI3/USDT trading pairs, all of which are now open for recharge.
The BROCCOLI series of tokens are all BSC chain memecoins, and they are hotly discussed in the community because of their name, which is the pet dog of CZ's family. AscendEX will continue to pay attention to market trends.
